decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Runner 'no notable delta' was a FALSE NEGATIVE — anonymous-curl scraper blank for 13/13 assets. Pulled real stats from live voidline Studio session (cookie alive, idle ~23h). v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q) = 319 views in 4 days = NEW CHANNEL RECORD, first asset to break the ~300v ceiling (prev best v2_twist 299, v1_twist 281). 0→319 qualifies as >50v delta alert. Question-hook + cutter-v2 formula re-validated. v3 batch still suppressed (hook 1v / twist 28v). Total published Shorts ~1,229v.

v1_bonus_briggs was stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC (06-15, 319v) via Studio content table. Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z. Backfilled real view counts into stats_log.csv 06-19 snapshot (was blank from scraper).

(1) Hourly pulse NOT firing hourly — 6-day gap since 06-13. (2) Pulse spike detector blind in cloud (anon curl → consent page); CRITICAL to port monitor to camoufox-stealth. (3) One DRAFT Short staged but unscheduled ('9 Barrels Vapor Theory'), not in state — pipeline dry past it.
